cards.back: Values individualism, collaboration, and responding to change over following a plan
Guides teams in iterative development, emphasizes teamwork, and prioritizes sprint planning and retrospectives
A linear approach to software development, emphasizing sequential phases and minimal interaction between phases
A visual system for managing work, emphasizing continuous flow, limit WIP, and continuous improvement
A mindset that emphasizes value, flow, and continuous improvement, aiming to minimize waste and maximize value delivered
